claims.source_quote: Fisheries’share in GDP is 0.41 percent but has a value addition in export earnings.
claims.claim: Fisheries accounted for 0.41 percent of GDP and contributed value addition through export earnings.
claims.indicator_or_subject: fisheries GDP share and export earnings

claims.source_quote: total marine and inland fish production was estimated at 520,000 m. tons
claims.claim: Fish production during July-March 2016-17 was estimated at 520,000 metric tons, compared with 501,000 metric tons in July-March 2015-16.

claims.source_quote: The exports of fish and fish preparations have increased by 12.20 percent in quantity and 15.09 percent in value
claims.claim: Exports of fish and fish preparations rose in both quantity and value during July-March 2016-17 compared with July-March 2015-16.

claims.source_quote: Government of Pakistan is taking a number of steps to improve fisheries sector.
claims.claim: The Government of Pakistan was taking steps to improve the fisheries sector, including extension services, new fishing methods, value-added products, fish consumption, and fishermen's socio-economic conditions.

claims.source_quote: samples of seawater collected from coastal areas were analyzed to determine parameters which affect fish distribution.
claims.claim: During July-March 2016-17, biological and hydrological research activities analyzed seawater samples, examined fish samples, and monitored fish landings to assess fish distribution and stock conditions.
claims.effect: determine parameters affecting fish distribution and stock position

claims.source_quote: MFD has issued 14,174 certificates of Health and Quality & Origin
claims.claim: The Marine Fisheries Department regulated seafood quality and promoted fishery exports, issuing 14,174 Health and Quality & Origin certificates for seafood commodities exported from Pakistan during July-March 2016-17.
claims.effect: regulate quality and promote export of fish and fishery products

claims.subsection: iii) Turtle Excluder Device (TED) and Trials of TED by Local Fishermen
claims.source_quote: A training course on construction, installation and use of TED was also conducted
claims.claim: A training course was conducted for shrimp trawler fishermen on the construction, installation, and use of Turtle Excluder Devices, with 55 participants including representatives of other organizations.

claims.subsection: iii) Turtle Excluder Device (TED) and Trials of TED by Local Fishermen
claims.source_quote: The primary purpose of introduction of TED is to reduce the mortality of sea turtles
claims.claim: The Turtle Excluder Device was introduced to reduce sea turtle mortality in fishing nets and to satisfy United States regulatory requirements for shrimp exports to the USA.
policy_or_programmes: United States regulation for the export of shrimp to USA
claims.constraint_or_risk: sea turtle mortality in fishing nets; obligatory United States regulation for shrimp exports
claims.effect: reduce the mortality of sea turtles in fishing nets and fulfill United States regulatory requirements for shrimp exports

claims.subsection: iii) Turtle Excluder Device (TED) and Trials of TED by Local Fishermen
claims.source_quote: assigned the task to the Maritime Security Agency for ensuring compliance with the TED
claims.claim: Federal and provincial governments assigned the Maritime Security Agency to ensure compliance with Turtle Excluder Device requirements on all fishing boats at sea.
claims.policy_or_programme: FAO's Code of Conduct for responsible fishing
policy_or_programmes: FAO's Code of Conduct for responsible fishing
claims.constraint_or_risk: non-compliance with TED on fishing boats
claims.effect: ensuring compliance with the TED on all the fishing boats in the sea

claims.source_quote: a total number of 1300 fishing boats have been modified.
claims.claim: Technical assistance for modifying fishing boats was provided to provincial governments and relevant stakeholders to meet EU and other importing-country requirements, resulting in 1,300 modified fishing boats.
claims.cause: technical assistance in respect of modification of fishing boats

claims.source_quote: no deep sea fishing vessel was not in operation.
claims.claim: During the reporting period, no deep sea fishing vessel was in operation.
claims.constraint_or_risk: no deep sea fishing vessel in operation

claims.source_quote: Prime Minister’s Deep Sea Fishing Policy is being revised in consultation with all relevant stakeholders.
claims.claim: The Prime Minister's Deep Sea Fishing Policy was being revised in consultation with relevant stakeholders.
claims.policy_or_programme: Prime Minister's Deep Sea Fishing Policy
policy_or_programmes: Prime Minister's Deep Sea Fishing Policy
claims.effect: policy is being revised in consultation with all relevant stakeholders
